page_chunk: Order ORD-002 detail: Placed January 20, 2026. Contains 1 item — Anker 737 Power Bank (24000mAh, $99.99). Subtotal $99.99, shipping $0.00 (free), tax $8.25, order total $108.24. Paid with Mastercard ending 5510.

Order ORD-002 shipping: Currently processing at the Seattle fulfillment center. No tracking number assigned yet. Estimated delivery January 23, 2026. Current status: processing, awaiting carrier pickup.
